title: Gaveno Cavailia 100% Natural Cotton Thick Absorbent 450 GSM Hampton Hand Towel [ Pack of 4-Black (50x80 cm)
features: STYLISH NEW HAMPTON TOWEL DESIGN: The sumptuous hampton range brings elegance and grace into your bathroom furnishings with its simple block color design in an array of fabulous shades
FANTASTIC ABSORBENT PROPERTIES: Designed for maximum absorbency, these exquisite Hampton towels are perfect for helping you dry off quickly so you can focus on going about your busy lifestyle
SUPER SOFT AND COSY: Made from super soft material, these fabulous towels feel luxuriously smooth against your skin and help keep you warm as you dry off
MACHINE WASHABLE: Crafted from easy care material, these machine washable bathroom linen items are quick and convenient to look after in the comfort of your own home
EXTENSIVE RANGE: With a number of attractive colors and different towel sizes available, whatever your needs, you can find just what you are looking for in our striking Hampton range
description: From the brand GC GAVENO CAVAILIA TOWELS COLLECTION Previous page ABOUT BRAND: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA has something for everyone, from simple patterns to bold and luxurious offerings. Our Bed&Bath Collection is comfortable & Stylish, with a variety of eye-catching colors and designs to choose from. PRODUCT RANGE: Variety of exciting items to choose from, all crafted with comfort & style in mind, we are confident you will not regret choosing GC GAVENO CAVAILIA to refresh your bed linen collection.
